seoTitle: Ournie vs Owens Gap — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ournie and Owens Gap. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ournie vs Owens Gap: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ournie and Owens Gap.
heading: Ournie vs Owens Gap — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ournie, New South Wales and Owens Gap, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Owens Gap has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Ournie (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ournie or Owens Gap safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ournie has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Owens Gap scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ournie scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Owens Gap scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ournie or Owens Gap?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Owens Gap has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
